channel.title: Cursor Blog
channel.description: Cursor Blog — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Speeding up GPU kernels by 38% with a multi-agent system
item.description: Our multi-agent system autonomously optimized 235 CUDA kernels for NVIDIA Blackwell 200 GPUs, achieving a 38% geomean speedup over baselines in just 3 weeks.

item.title: Interact with agent-created visualizations in canvases
item.description: Agents can now create interactive canvases to visually represent information.

item.title: Better AI models enable more ambitious work
item.description: A University of Chicago study of 500 companies finds AI usage rose 44% as models improved, with more growth in higher-complexity and cross-system work.

item.title: Amplitude ships 3x more production code with Cursor
item.description: Amplitude uses Cursor to build an autonomous development pipeline that takes software from idea to production with minimal developer intervention.

item.title: Keeping the Cursor app stable
item.description: How we measure crash and OOM rates, debug memory issues with top-down and bottom-up strategies, and ship mitigations and guardrails as the app grows.

item.title: Cursor partners with SpaceX on model training
item.description: Cursor is partnering with SpaceX to accelerate our model training efforts.

item.title: National Australia Bank accelerates legacy migrations with Cursor
item.description: NAB standardized 6,000 developers on Cursor after evaluating Amazon Q and GitHub Copilot. Legacy modernizations are now running 3x faster and at higher quality.
